title: Simple Backpacks
description: This mod adds three tiers of Simple Backpacks, each available in three color options!
body:
## A straightforward mod that adds three basic backpacks.
_**! Currently being in developement for 21.1.2 version of Neoforge and fabric.**_

Some items from mod:

![Some items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1ecf54f5034f9eec390cf8d92c505cf38a9fb08.gif)

_See all recipes with (jei/rei mod) or in Gallery :]_


### **Credits:**

- This project has been fully recreated in MCreator with my taste, and the textures have been slightly modified from the originals.
- You can use this in every modback you want :]
- All Credits to the [Original Mod Idea Owner](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mod/backpack/)
- All Credits to the [Extended Mod Idea Owner](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forge-backpacks)
